bird.name: Puerto Rican euphonia
bird.summary: The Puerto Rican euphonia (Chlorophonia sclateri) is a species of bird in the family Fringillidae, the finches and euphonias. It is endemic…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Puerto Rican euphonia
relations.evidence: It inhabits a variety of landscapes including the interior and edges of evergreen, deciduous, and secondary forests. It especially favors areas heavy with mistletoe (Loranthaceae). In elevation it ranges from sea level to the island's highest point at about
